scripts.dev: node tools/site-build.mjs && concurrently --kill-others "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i site/styles/tailwind.css -o dist/assets/site.css --watch" "http-server dist -p 4173 -c-1"
scripts.build: node tools/site-build.mjs && tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i site/styles/tailwind.css -o dist/assets/site.css --minify
